steps.title: Identify the clue about authenticity
steps.content: The strongest signal comes right after “truly shines” — the narrator explains that Pheus “becomes another person, a more heightened version of himself” on stage. This shows the narrator is describing a moment of genuine, authentic self-expression.

steps.title: Match the word meaning to the choice
steps.content:
The target meaning is “genuinely” or “in reality.” Really works perfectly because it's essentially a synonym for “truly” in this context — this is where Pheus authentically shines.

Mildly, scarcely, and impolitely all miss this meaning or contradict the passage's vivid description of heightened performance.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
